algorithm: strict delayed dense-retrieval path utility with causal recency memory; no gradient training; cosine kNN empirical quantiles; direct signed-utility execution

input.causal_context_rule: for each completed-hour anchor end, use values[:, end-context:end] only

target.invalid_rows: NaN when entry/exit/path is non-finite, non-positive entry, out-of-bounds, or exit not before cutoff

strict_protocol.phase1: extract only signal dates <2024; generate path labels only when exit<2024; run retrieval only through signals<2024; fit/in-sample score prefix NaN
strict_protocol.memory: row j may enter memory only when positions[j]+1+576 <= current signal position and age_bars=current-position[j] is <= the recency max age; all means no age cap
strict_protocol.selection: 2023 metrics only; positive return and >=8 trades; actual executable path hash de-dupe; no rolling percentile/quantile gates
strict_protocol.phase2: after frozen manifest, extract full PCA only for selected recency specs, generate full path targets, rerun causal retrieval from scratch, assert frozen 2023 executable hashes unchanged, then compute OOS metrics/diagnostics/cost stress

policy.rule: finite score > 0 goes long, finite score < 0 goes short, zero/NaN flat; side policy may disable either side

retrieval.target_availability: row j may enter memory only when positions[j]+1+576 <= current signal position and current-position[j] <= max_age_bars when bounded
retrieval.fit_standardization: per-dimension mean/std fit on admissible 2020-2022 rows only, then L2 normalize

retrieval.target_availability: row j may enter memory only when positions[j]+1+576 <= current signal position and current-position[j] <= max_age_bars when bounded
retrieval.fit_standardization: per-dimension mean/std fit on admissible 2020-2022 rows only, then L2 normalize

representation.mean_rule: causal mean over current and previous 7 anchor PCA32 states
representation.valid_rule: current plus all 8 contributing anchor PCA32 states valid
